trivia_bullets.text: Woodland Champion appears in Core Set 2020 (released July 2019) as an uncommon Elf Scout — a set designed as a return-to-basics core set following the Ravnica block, centered on planeswalker stories and accessible green creature strategies. [Scryfall]

Flavor text: "Every footfall on the forest floor is a heartbeat sending strength into my veins." [Scryfall]. The quote has no named speaker — it is presented as the Champion's own internal voice, emphasizing the character's deep bond with the forest as a living feedback loop rather than an external source of power.

Oracle text: whenever one or more tokens you control enter, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature. This scales linearly with token production — a single Saproling Migration creating two tokens puts two counters on Woodland Champion simultaneously. Go-wide token strategies (Saproling, Soldier, Elf tokens) can grow it to a 6/6 or larger by turn 4. Card Kingdom noted its synergy with G/W token generators in early M20 limited analysis. [Scryfall; Card Kingdom Blog: 'Go Wide with G/W Tokens']
sources: Card Kingdom Blog: 'Go Wide with G/W Tokens'

trivia_bullets.text: Art by Randy Vargas, a Cuban illustrator (Instagram: @vargasni) who has contributed over 150 cards to MTG. Vargas illustrated multiple M20 cards including Rotting Regisaur and Season of Growth; his style — saturated natural lighting, confident figure-in-motion compositions — is well-suited to the forest-sprint scene here. No dedicated Hipsters of the Coast artist feature on Vargas found in this research pass. [artofmtg.com; Scryfall]
